2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch renames two io_uring APIs: `io_buffer_register_bvec()` and `io_buffer_unregister_bvec()`. The first is renamed to `io_buffer_register_request()` to prepare for supporting kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring, which will register bvecs directly. The second is renamed to `io_buffer_unregister()` to make its name more generic, as it will be used by both the new and old APIs for unregistration. This change is part of a series of patches that aim to support registering bvecs directly.
